title: Small Event Catering
summary: Boutique catering for showers, rehearsal gatherings, micro-weddings, and business dinners across Port Angeles and Sequim.
benefits: Curated menus scaled for intimate celebrations with elevated presentation.
Flexible service styles including plated dinners, grazing tables, and family-style meals.
Professional execution that lets you focus on guests instead of logistics.
idealFor: Hosts planning stylish events for 8-40 guests who value quality over volume.
